heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 13109 Authorization of appropriations
text: There is authorized to be appropriated to the Administrator $8,000,000 for each of the fiscal years 1991, 1992, and 1993 for functions carried out under this chapter (other than State Grants), and $8,000,000 for each of the fiscal years 1991, 1992, and 1993, for grant programs to States issued pursuant to .1section 13104 of this titleSo in original. Probably should not be capitalized.1
